name: Zraziki Po Krakowsku -- Polish Beef Roll-Ups
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the round steak into thin pieces, about 4 1/2 by 2 inches.
2. Score the steak and sprinkle with salt and pepper.
3. In a bowl, combine bread crumbs, beaten egg, grated onion, 4 tbsp of melted butter, salt, and pepper to form the dressing.
4. Spread the dressing evenly on each piece of meat.
5. Roll up each piece of meat and secure it with a skewer or toothpick.
6. Roll the meat in flour and brown in remaining butter.
7. Add 2 cups of water (or meat stock if available) and simmer for 1 1/2 hours, removing the toothpicks at the end.
8. Pour gravy over the meat.
9. Garnish with chopped parsley and serve with mashed potatoes.
